English: A turned Pandoran Arthron: a heavy bruiser that grows chitin armour and fights with crushing claws.
Innate mastery of claw and viral-gun bodyparts; can also wield human Handguns and PDWs.
Thickened chitin plates add +10 Armour to all body parts.
Corrosive secretions etch every attack for +15 bonus damage.
The carapace keeps growing: +15 Armour and +5 Endurance (+50 max HP).
Hypertrophied claw muscles add +20 bonus attack damage.
Resilient Pandoran biology adds +8 Endurance (+80 max HP).

Chinese (Simplified): +10 Endurance (+100 max HP) and +10 bonus attack damage.
